overview: SottoPelle specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy delivered via pellet implants customized by trained medical professionals. Treatments provide consistent, 24/7 hormone delivery lasting 4-6 months.
highlights: Pellet implants lasting 4-6 months with continuous hormone delivery
Customized formulations for women, men, and transgender patients
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormonal decline due to aging who seek bioidentical hormone replacement therapy.
